name: financial-services-copilot
description: GitHub Copilot CLI port of the Anthropic Claude for Financial Services agents, skills, and MCP connectors. Same content as the Cowork/Claude Code marketplace, registered for /plugin install in Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: financial-services
plugins.description: All 10 specialists, 9 verticals, 39 commands, and 12 MCP connectors as a single Copilot CLI extension. Install once via npx -y github:dmauser/financial-services init or /plugin install.

plugins.name: financial-analysis
plugins.description: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC.

plugins.name: investment-banking
plugins.description: CIMs, teasers, process letters, buyer lists, merger models, deal tracking.

plugins.name: equity-research
plugins.description: Earnings notes, initiations, model updates, thesis and catalyst tracking.

plugins.name: private-equity
plugins.description: Sourcing, screening, diligence checklists, IC memos, portfolio monitoring.

plugins.name: wealth-management
plugins.description: Client reviews, financial plans, rebalancing, reporting, TLH.

plugins.name: fund-admin
plugins.description: GL recon, break tracing, accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary, NAV tie-out.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: KYC document parsing and rules-grid evaluation.

plugins.name: lseg
plugins.description: Bond RV, swap curves, FX carry, options vol, macro-rates monitoring on LSEG data.

plugins.name: sp-global
plugins.description: Tear sheets, earnings previews, funding digests on S&P Capital IQ.

plugins.name: pitch-agent
plugins.description: Comps, precedents, LBO to a branded pitch deck, end to end.

plugins.name: meeting-prep-agent
plugins.description: Briefing pack before every client meeting.

plugins.name: market-researcher
plugins.description: Sector or theme to industry overview, competitive landscape, peer comps, ideas shortlist.

plugins.name: earnings-reviewer
plugins.description: Earnings call and filings to model update to note draft.

plugins.name: model-builder
plugins.description: DCF, LBO, 3-statement, comps - live in Excel.

plugins.name: valuation-reviewer
plugins.description: Ingests GP packages, runs valuation template, stages LP reporting.

plugins.name: gl-reconciler
plugins.description: Finds breaks, traces root cause, routes for sign-off.

plugins.name: month-end-closer
plugins.description: Accruals, roll-forwards, variance commentary.

plugins.name: statement-auditor
plugins.description: Audits LP statements before distribution.

plugins.name: kyc-screener
plugins.description: Parses onboarding docs, runs the rules engine, flags gaps.
